LAW AND MOTION, 301, RESPONDENT RICKY KELVIN JOY'S MOTION TO DISMISS APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER [LABOR CODE 98.2(A) & (B)] IS DENIED. APPELLANT DID TIMELY SUBMIT TO THE CLERK AND SERVE A NOTICE OF APPEAL ON RESPONDENT'S FORM. NOTWITHSTANDING THE CLERK'S INSISTENCE OF A CORRECTION OF A MINOR ERROR ON THE FORM.
